reasoning: Elon Musk publicly announced his 'America Party' in July 2025 following a row over the 'One Big Beautiful Bill.' However, since the public announcement, there has been no evidence of official FEC filings. Furthermore, a late August 2025 WSJ report indicated he had 'shelved' the plans, likely to preserve political relationships and because operating through his heavy-spending America PAC allows for unlimited donations, unlike a formal political party. Given that we are now in November 2025 with less than two months until the end of the year and no recent momentum, the likelihood of him completing the necessary FEC paperwork and formalizing the party by December 31, 2025 is very low.
batch_queries: site:fec.gov "Elon Musk" OR "America Party" Statement of Organization 2025
political analysts "Elon Musk" new third party odds predictions 2025
"Elon Musk" "One Big Beautiful Bill" political party update November 2025
"Elon Musk" decides against OR PAC instead OR walk back "America Party"
